steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ months and the seal's length was $85$ centimeters. That is the constant term in the linear model.

steps.title: Use the monthly rate
steps.content: The length increases by $3.2$ centimeters per month, so the coefficient of $x$ is $3.2$. $$y=3.2x+85$$ The answer is D.
